sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56999" key="kefali/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεφᾰλ-ίνη</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n56999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">root of the tongue</tr_>, supposed to be the seat of taste, hence also called <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γεῦσις</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.107</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
